meta.title: SaaSPro — All-in-One Business Platform
meta.description: Manage clients, automate workflows, track analytics, and grow your business — all in one place.

hero.desc: Manage clients, automate workflows, track analytics, and grow — all in one place. Replace the messy combo of spreadsheets, emails, and disconnected tools.
hero.footnote: No credit card required. Free for up to 10 clients.

features.heading: Everything you need to scale your business
features.subtitle: Purpose-built for growing teams. Not bloated enterprise software with features you'll never touch.

items.title: Smart Analytics
items.desc: Real-time dashboards with actionable insights. Track revenue, client growth, engagement, and key metrics at a glance.

items.title: Team Collaboration
items.desc: Workspaces with role-based access, shared calendars, task assignments, and built-in messaging. Keep everyone on the same page.

items.title: Integrations & Automations
items.desc: Connect with Stripe, Slack, Google Workspace, and more. Automate repetitive tasks like invoicing, reminders, and data sync.

items.quote: I was spending 8 hours a week on scheduling and invoicing. SaaSPro cut that to 30 minutes.
items.name: Alex Martinez

items.quote: My clients love the portal. They can see their schedule and pay instantly. No more chasing payments.
items.name: Jordan Lee

items.quote: Finally a tool built for how we actually work. The analytics dashboard alone is worth it.
items.name: Priya Sharma

items.q: How is this different from spreadsheets and email?
items.a: Spreadsheets don't automate workflows, track payments, or provide a client portal. SaaSPro ties everything together in one seamless platform.

items.q: Can my clients access their own information?
items.a: Yes. Each client gets a secure portal where they can view their profile, upcoming events, invoices, and payment history.

items.q: How does billing and invoicing work?
items.a: Create invoices manually or let SaaSPro auto-generate them from completed services. Clients pay by credit card through Stripe.

items.q: What kind of businesses is this for?
items.a: SaaSPro works for freelancers, consultants, agencies, coaches, and service-based businesses of all kinds. If you manage clients, this is for you.
Yes. The Free plan supports up to 10 clients with basic features. Upgrade to Pro ($29/mo) for unlimited clients and advanced features.

items.q: Can I import my existing client list?
items.a: Yes. You can bulk-import clients from a CSV file. Export anytime too — your data belongs to you.

cta.heading: Ready to streamline your business?
cta.desc: Start free. No credit card required. Upgrade as you grow.

pricing.title: Choose the right plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free and upgrade as your business grows
